name: Claude Opus 4.5 (Medium)
note: Medium effort matches Sonnet 4.5's peak SWE-bench score while using 76% fewer output tokens.
verificationNotes: Model confirmed real: release date 2025-11-24, 200K context, $5/$25 API pricing all verified live on anthropic.com/news/claude-opus-4-5. Anthropic's post and secondary write-ups (theunwindai, datacamp) only state qualitatively that medium effort 'matches Sonnet 4.5's best SWE-bench score' (Sonnet 4.5's own 77.2% is separately sourced elsewhere) — no page states a literal numeric SWE-bench score for Opus 4.5 itself at medium effort, so the unconfirmable 77.2 result row was dropped rather than kept as an inferred number.
